agent_memory.domain: Personal care products industry stock picking
agent_memory.purpose: Nuanced concepts for a portfolio construction/stock picking agent.

sections.context: FDA oversight now includes facility registration, product listings, adverse-event reporting, and adequate safety substantiation. Fragrance-allergen labeling rules are pending. Expect ongoing compliance costs, SKU audits, and tighter claim risk—especially around 'clinically proven' positioning.
sections.investment_insight: Favor portfolios already aligned with MoCRA; discount stories leaning on aggressive efficacy claims without robust substantiation.
metrics_raw: Facility registration and product listing required
Increased compliance/Opex and SKU rationalization risk

sections.topic: State Chemical Bans (PFAS, Talc, Formaldehyde in Hair Smoothing)
sections.context: State-level bans and restrictions (e.g., PFAS) force reformulations and can strand inventory. Talc scrutiny and formaldehyde-related policies heighten recall and litigation risk.
sections.investment_insight: Reward companies with clean ingredient roadmaps and reformulation plans; penalize those with heavy exposure to flagged chemistries.
metrics_raw: Inventory obsolescence risk on non-compliant SKUs

sections.context: Staggered bans under REACH hit rinse-off first, then leave-on and color over time; fragrance microcapsule technology faces deadlines as well.
sections.investment_insight: Assess category mix sensitivity (scrubs, color, microcapsule fragrances) and capex/R&D burden for reformulation.

sections.context: Imported 'general cosmetics' can avoid animal tests if documentation is met, while 'special cosmetics' (e.g., hair dye, SPF) face stricter pathways. 'Cruelty-free' positioning can constrain China growth or necessitate parallel SKUs.
sections.investment_insight: Value supply chains and claim strategies that preserve China optionality without undermining brand ethos.
metrics_raw: General vs. special cosmetics pathways differ

sections.context: Prestige portfolios are highly exposed to Asia travel retail, which is volatile with airport traffic, daigou flows, and policy changes (e.g., Hainan).
sections.investment_insight: Discount heavy travel-retail reliance; prize balanced channel mixes with healthy sell-through and controlled markdowns.
metrics_raw: Inventory health and markdown cadence in travel retail

sections.topic: Amazon Premium Beauty as a Re-Rating Variable
sections.context: Reluctant prestige brands are listing on Amazon, improving reach but risking price integrity and promotional depth if mismanaged.
sections.investment_insight: Monitor assortment control, counterfeit mitigation, review velocity, and take-rate math to gauge margin sustainability.

sections.context: Sustained share gains correlate with heavy, efficient advertising and promotion; leaders often spend a high % of sales with rising ROI.
sections.investment_insight: Track A&P % of sales, digital mix, and whether gross-to-A&P contribution is widening alongside share gains.

sections.context: Many brands rely on a handful of hero SKUs; viral surges or claim/safety hits can whipsaw sell-through, working capital, and guidance.
sections.investment_insight: Map SKU concentration and exposure to scrutinized actives (e.g., retinoids, niacinamide, AHA/BHA) to size downside tails.

sections.context: Fatty alcohols/surfactants (palm/coconut-derived), ethanol, and fragrance oils drive COGS volatility. Hedging, dual sourcing, and RSPO compliance defend gross margin.
sections.investment_insight: Favor diversified sourcing and hedging programs; assess pass-through cadence and elasticity by category.

sections.context: Extended Producer Responsibility regimes add reporting, fees, and recyclability mandates through the decade; moves portfolios toward PET/mono-materials, lighter glass, and refill systems.
sections.investment_insight: Scaled players with packaging ops and retailer partnerships can protect margin; check timelines and capex for redesign.

sections.context: Mass merchants impose chargebacks for service-level misses. Smaller or fast-growing indie brands can see EBITDA hits from logistics slip-ups.
sections.investment_insight: Scrutinize vendor-compliance commentary, DC fill rates, and OTIF penalties as hidden EBITDA drags.
metrics_raw: DC fill rate and lead-time reliability

sections.topic: Claims & Litigation Risk as a Valuation Governor
sections.context: Regulatory and class-action scrutiny of 'clinical' and 'derm-tested' claims raise the bar on substantiation and pharmacovigilance-style monitoring.
sections.investment_insight: Prefer brands with robust clinical dossiers and adverse-event systems; avoid hype-led claims without evidence.

sections.context: Dermocosmetics and physician-endorsed brands show steadier repeat rates, less promo depth, and better lifetime value.
sections.investment_insight: Assign premium to science-led franchises with medical-detailing networks and HCP credibility.

sections.context: Social discovery and 'dupe' culture can turbocharge trial but creates spiky demand; platform disruption would rebase CAC and funnels.
sections.investment_insight: Stress-test reliance on specific social channels; reward diversified acquisition and owned-community strength.
metrics_raw: CAC volatility tied to platform changes

sections.context: Portfolios aligned with MoCRA/EU microplastics/PFAS regimes face fewer surprises and less stranded inventory risk.
sections.investment_insight: Assign higher multiples and lower discount rates to de-risked portfolios with clear regulatory roadmaps.

sections.context: Intrinsic value improves when travel-retail reliance is modest, Amazon execution is controlled, and mass/derm channels grow without promo bloat.
sections.investment_insight: Prefer diversified, high-quality distribution with disciplined pricing and healthy sell-through.

sections.context: Consistent gross-to-A&P spread expansion with share gains signals durable brand equity.
sections.investment_insight: Back management teams that compound brand equity via efficient A&P and rising ROI.

sections.context: Multi-sourcing for oleochemicals/fragrance, RSPO/sustainable sourcing, and packaging redesign mitigate volatility and EPR fees.
sections.investment_insight: Favor companies with hedging programs, supplier diversity, and credible sustainability sourcing.

sections.context: Clinical dossiers and conservative marketing reduce enforcement and class-action risks.
sections.investment_insight: Apply a higher quality score to brands with robust evidence and pharmacovigilance processes.
